Operation 'getStatusJson' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description is too minimal and lacks context about what compliance data is included, what the response contains, and the use case. Added details about aggregated data, specific content types (metrics, status, indicators), and clarified this is for programmatic access versus the HTML dashboard endpoint.

data.current_description: Retrieve agency compliance status data in JSON format.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve aggregated Federal Source Code Policy compliance status data for all agencies in JSON format. Returns compliance metrics, agency-level status information, and policy adherence indicators. Use this endpoint for programmatic access to compliance dashboards and reporting.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal and lacks context about what compliance data is included, what the response contains, and the use case. Added details about aggregated data, specific content types (metrics, status, indicators), and clarified this is for programmatic access versus the HTML dashboard endpoint.

message: Operation 'getAgencyIssues' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks clarity about input requirements (agencyName parameter), output structure (grouped format details), and practical use cases. Enhanced version specifies the required parameter, explains what types of issues are returned, clarifies the grouping structure, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this endpoint.

data.current_description: List grouped repository validation issues for a specific agency.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve repository validation issues for a specified agency, grouped by issue type or repository. Returns a list of validation failures, warnings, and compliance problems identified during repository indexing. The agencyName parameter filters results to a single federal agency. Useful for identifying compliance gaps and remediation priorities.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about input requirements (agencyName parameter), output structure (grouped format details), and practical use cases. Enhanced version specifies the required parameter, explains what types of issues are returned, clarifies the grouping structure, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'getAgencyFetched' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary uses awkward phrasing ('fetched repositories'). Description is vague about what 'indexed' means and lacks output details. Enhanced version clarifies that these are repositories successfully indexed in Code.gov, specifies the required parameter, explains what metadata is returned, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this endpoint to verify agency coverage.

data.current_description: Display indexed repositories for a specific agency.
data.summary_suggestion: List indexed repositories for an agency
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the list of repositories that have been successfully indexed and are currently available in the Code.gov inventory for a specified federal agency. The agencyName parameter filters results to a single agency. Returns repository metadata including names, URLs, and indexing status. Use this to verify agency repository coverage in the federal source code inventory.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses awkward phrasing ('fetched repositories'). Description is vague about what 'indexed' means and lacks output details. Enhanced version clarifies that these are repositories successfully indexed in Code.gov, specifies the required parameter, explains what metadata is returned, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this endpoint to verify agency coverage.

message: Operation 'listTerms' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity about what 'indexed terms' are and their purpose. Added context about terms being extracted from repository metadata, their use case (faceting/filtering), and what the operation returns to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Extract indexed terms from the repository data for faceting and filtering.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve indexed terms extracted from repository metadata for use in faceting and filtering search results. Returns a list of terms with their frequency and usage across the federal code inventory.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity about what 'indexed terms' are and their purpose. Added context about terms being extracted from repository metadata, their use case (faceting/filtering), and what the operation returns to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getRepoJson' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_context. Summary is somewhat vague about the action and purpose. Description mentions 'validation' but doesn't clearly explain what the schema is used for or why an agent would need it. Added clarity about the schema's purpose (defining structure and validation rules), its use case (validating submissions and understanding data structure), and improved the summary to be more action-oriented for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Access the repository JSON schema definition used for code inventory validation.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the JSON schema definition that defines the structure and validation rules for repository objects in the federal code inventory. This schema is used to validate repository metadata submissions and can be used by clients to understand the repository data structure.
data.reasoning: Summary is somewhat vague about the action and purpose. Description mentions 'validation' but doesn't clearly explain what the schema is used for or why an agent would need it. Added clarity about the schema's purpose (defining structure and validation rules), its use case (validating submissions and understanding data structure), and improved the summary to be more action-oriented for better AI agent interpretability.
